calendar.matters:
PETITION TO ESTABLISH FACT OF MARRIAGE
Off Calendar Oct-01-2019 Denied
MINI MINUTES:
Appearances:
Brian Lunn Carnright, petitioner, in propria persona.

Mr. Carnright stated the hospital officiant performed the marriage on July 13th in the hospital, Ms. Connor died on July 18th, the officiant took all the paperwork but did not get the marriage license from room 168 in City Hall. Mr. Carnright further stated this was an oversight by the hospital officiant, the hospital was against Ms. Conner wanting an autopsy, he has known her since 1983. The Court stated the petition is not legally supported.

The Court DENIED the petition to establish fact, date, and place of marriage.

Judge: Peter J. Busch. Clerk: S. Le. Deputy: C. Kabasares. Not reported.

PETITION TO ESTABLISH FACT OF MARRIAGE
Off Calendar Sep-17-2019 Continued To Oct-01-19 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204
